creator: sharky@schaack.io
text:
I found tried to implement what Allan did in the presentation

https://papers.freebsd.org/2015/vbsdcon/jude-interesting_zfs.files/vBSDCon2015_-_Interesting_ZFS.pdf

. Give User accesss rights that he can manage his own zfs dataset inside a jail. I'm today on 12.2 and it seems the bug is still there and for the the provided workaround does not work. 

Actually I don't know if this bug still exists in openzfs , but should this bug addressed to openzfs or is this a bug which only occur on freebsd ?

best regards, sebastian
